title: Demorchis tembatensis

Demorchis tembatensis, also known as the Tembat Orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to the tropical forests of India. The Tembat Orchid is said to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The Tembat Orchid is traditionally used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to have therapeutic benefits for various health conditions.
